nasb.text: And now, Lord, take note of their threats, and grant that Your bond-servants may speak Your word with all confidence,

esv.text: And now, Lord, look upon their threats and grant to your servants to continue to speak your word with all boldness,

cnv.text: 主啊，他們恐嚇我們，現在求你鑒察，也賜你僕人們大有膽量，傳講你的道。

ccb.text: 主啊，你看他们这样恐吓我们，求你帮助你的奴仆们坦然无惧地传你的道。

csbs.text: 主啊，现在求你鉴察他们的威吓，使你的奴仆们能满有胆量地传讲你的话语。
